creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
As an example, please see this build failure: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere3/data/141releng-armv7-default/eb87cb7f3aa2/logs/dexed-synth-0.9.7.log

> /wrkdirs/usr/ports/audio/dexed/work/dexed-0.9.7/libs/JUCE/modules/juce_core/maths/juce_BigInteger.cpp:1196:21:
>   error: too many arguments provided to function-like macro invocation
> 
>    1196 |     MemoryBlock mb ((size_t) numBytes);
>         |                     ^
> 
>   /usr/include/machine/atomic.h:54:9: note: macro 'mb' defined here
> 
>      54 | #define mb()   dmb()
>         |         ^
>
